title: Haiti midfielder Pierre out of FIFA World Cup 2026 with adductor injury
original_text: Haiti midfielder Pierre out of FIFA World Cup 2026 with adductor injury left FILE PHOTO: Leverton Pierre has been вҖҢruled out of the вҖӢFIFA World Cup 2026 вҒ with an adductor muscle injury. REUTERS https://ss-i.thgim.com/public/incoming/3cu5af/article71092144.ece/alternates/FREE_1200/2026-06-11T223825Z_525342081_RC21EKAM9E5A_RTRMADP_3_SOCCER-WORLDCUP-HIT-PIERRE.JPG COLE BURSTON FILE PHOTO: Soccer Football - International Friendly - Haiti v Tunisia - Toronto Stadium, Toronto, Canada - March 28, 2026 Haiti's Leverton Pierre REUTERS/Cole Burston/File Photo It has вҖӢcalled up centre-back Garven Metusala, who вҒ plays for the second-tier USL Championship club вҖҢColorado Springs Switchbacks, to replace Pierre. BOSTON Haiti midfielder вҖӢLeverton Pierre has been вҖҢruled out of the вҖӢFIFA World Cup 2026 вҒ with an adductor muscle injury, the countryвҖҷs football вҖҢfederation said on Thursday. вҖңLeverton Pierre вҖҢwill not be вҖҢable вҒ to play in вҒ the World Cup after the medical team detected вҖӢan injury вҖҢto his right adductor,вҖқ the Haitian Football Federation said in вҖҢa statement. It has вҖӢcalled up centre-back Garven Metusala, who вҒ plays for the second-tier USL Championship club вҖҢColorado Springs Switchbacks, to replace Pierre. Haiti faces Scotland on Saturday in its first Group C вҖҢmatch. It also plays вҖӢfive-times world champion Brazil as well вҒ as Morocco. Haiti is participating вҒ in its second World Cup after вҖҢan appearance in 1974.
